theorem_statement: For the admitted Project 21 Eidronic continuation carrier, the exact Klein-four chamber action is resolved under the paper-defined Petrie chamber construction as the product of two independent binary axes: endpoint polarity and transport-word order FV versus VF. Endpoint polarity generates the class-preserving within action, FV/VF order generates the class-changing action, and their product generates the third nontrivial involution. All four chamber realizations preserve the common continuation filament.

resolved_axes.product: endpoint polarity XOR FV/VF word order

boundary: Finite Project 21 Petrie endpoint-word mapping theorem only.
The result depends on the explicit manuscript chamber premises.
Endpoint polarity is the class-preserving within axis.
FV versus VF word order is the class-changing axis.
Their XOR is the third nontrivial Klein involution.
The four chamber realizations preserve one common continuation filament.
No Petrie-parity shadow, face-chirality theorem, literal {5,3,4}, Higgs mechanism, physics, force, or Gap A closure claim.
